statement: In every magma, Equation 2016 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (y * z)`) implies Equation 210 (`x = (x * (y * x)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0470
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op y z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op y x)) z)
